name: google-drive-merge-sync
description: Google Drive sync for Obsidian with word level merge conflict resolution.

scripts.test:
esbuild src/planner.ts --format=esm --outfile=test/planner.build.mjs && node test/planner.test.mjs && esbuild src/merge.ts --format=esm --outfile=test/merge.build.mjs && node -e "import('./test/merge.build.mjs').then(m => { const r = m.merge3('a
b','a
B','a2
b'); if (r.merged !== 'a2
B') throw new Error('merge smoke failed'); console.log('merge: smoke passed'); })" && esbuild src/drive.ts --bundle --format=esm --outfile=test/drive.build.mjs --alias:obsidian=./test/obsidian-shim.mjs --external:node:* && node test/drive.integration.mjs
scripts.deploy: npm run build && npm test && cp main.js manifest.json styles.css "/Users/simonaaimar/Desktop/AI SKILL/.obsidian/plugins/google-drive-merge-sync/" && echo DEPLOY-OK

author: kebl3541
